findings.title: Rename branch UI exists in unused ProjectSidebar component
findings.description: ProjectSidebar.tsx has a complete rename-branch UI (pencil icon, inline input, Save/Cancel) but is never imported or rendered in the app. The sidebar uses ProjectsSection.tsx which lacks rename functionality entirely.

findings.title: No workspace name rename capability
findings.description: There is no way to rename a workspace's display name. Only branch rename exists (in unused code). The workspace header shows a static h2 heading.
